name: RPlog_The_Capital_s_Underworld_Crooked_Roulette_Pt._2
title: The Capital's Underworld: Crooked Roulette, Part 2
summary: At a street gambling booth, Senator Tokoga of Dac and the medic Myiari play a few rounds of animal-themed roulette run by a smooth-talking dealer. Myiari wins early and keeps her bets modest while Tokoga, more amused by the game than the money, watches the wheel closely. After a string of suspiciously timed losses, the Senator notices a concealed twitch of the dealer's arm and quietly accuses him of cheating, advising him to have the arm looked at. The dealer's demeanor turns cold, and when onlookers begin to suspect rigging, he produces a chip bearing the insignia of the crime lord Bavon Nass, a name that instantly scatters the crowd. Unimpressed and unfamiliar with Nass, Myiari shrugs off the threat, and she and Tokoga walk away, leaving their lost credits behind while the Senator broods over how widely feared yet officially unknown Nass seems to be.
